shot_type_and_framing: close-up framing with the soap dispenser centered vertically and slightly left within the 9:16 frame, with the matching tumbler visible on the right side
camera_movement: slow lateral track from right to left
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel, medium focal length around 50mm, shallow depth of field to softly blur the background tiles

subject_description: a beige stone soap dispenser with an intricate cutout pattern and a stainless steel pump, accompanied by a matching cutout-pattern stone tumbler, both placed on a rectangular beige stone tray

overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, with a natural and warm filmic quality
